# Cek Data Bocor

> Free, ad-free, privacy-first service for Indonesian users to check if their email accounts have been compromised in publicly known data breaches. Built and maintained independently by an Indonesian developer.

## Site Details

- **Domain**: https://databocor.web.id
- **Language**: Indonesian (Bahasa Indonesia) — UI, risk analysis, and mitigation recommendations are all localized.
- **Purpose**: Cybersecurity awareness tool that checks emails against global breach databases and returns risk scores with actionable remediation steps.

## Main Pages

- https://databocor.web.id/
  Home page — email search form to check for data breaches.

- https://databocor.web.id/check
  Results page — displays breach details, risk score, risk rating, and security recommendations after an email check.

- https://databocor.web.id/about
  About this project — mission, data sources, and security commitments.

- https://databocor.web.id/faq
  Frequently Asked Questions — how the service works, privacy guarantees, and account recovery guidance.

- https://databocor.web.id/privacy
  Privacy Policy — no-storage policy, caching details, and rate limiting disclosure.

- https://databocor.web.id/contact
  Contact — developer email for questions, feedback, or collaboration.

## Tech Stack

- **Frontend**: Astro 4.x (Static Site Generation), TypeScript, Tailwind CSS 3.x.
- **Backend**: FastAPI (Python 3.13), Uvicorn, Pydantic v2, HTTPX.
- **Deployment**: Vercel (Edge static + Serverless API functions).
- **Architecture**: Clean separation of Static Edge UI and Serverless Python API.

## Public API Endpoints

### `POST /api/check` — Check Email Breach Status

Evaluates whether an email address has appeared in known data breaches. Returns breach details, a risk score (0–100), a risk rating, and mitigation recommendations — all in Indonesian.

**Request:**

```json
{
  "email": "user@example.com"
}
```

**Response (breached):**

```json
{
  "email": "user@example.com",
  "is_breached": true,
  "status": "success",
  "breaches_count": 3,
  "breaches": [
    {
      "breach": "ExampleService",
      "details": "Deskripsi kebocoran dalam Bahasa Indonesia.",
      "domain": "example.com",
      "industry": "Technology",
      "logo": "https://example.com/logo.png",
      "breach_date": "2024-01-15",
      "records": 5000000,
      "password_risk": "Lemah (Mudah Didekripsi)",
      "xposed_data": "Email, Password, Username"
    }
  ],
  "risk_assessment": {
    "score": 72,
    "rating": "Tinggi",
    "breakdown": {
      "breaches_count": 3,
      "has_password": true,
      "has_phone": false,
      "has_username": true,
      "is_recent": true,
      "is_critical": false
    }
  },
  "recommendations": [
    {
      "priority": "Tinggi",
      "title": "Ganti Password Segera",
      "description": "Ubah kata sandi pada layanan yang terdampak.",
      "action_steps": ["Gunakan password unik", "Aktifkan 2FA"]
    }
  ],
  "cached": false,
  "timestamp": 1752883200.0
}
```

**Response (clean):**

```json
{
  "email": "user@example.com",
  "is_breached": false,
  "status": "clean",
  "breaches_count": 0,
  "breaches": [],
  "risk_assessment": {
    "score": 0,
    "rating": "Aman",
    "breakdown": {
      "breaches_count": 0,
      "has_password": false,
      "has_phone": false,
      "has_username": false,
      "is_recent": false,
      "is_critical": false
    }
  },
  "recommendations": [],
  "cached": false,
  "timestamp": 1752883200.0
}
```

**Rate Limit:** Max 10 requests per minute per IP. Returns HTTP 429 with `Retry-After` header when exceeded.
**Cache:** Results are cached in-memory for 10 minutes (TTL).

### `GET /api/health` — Health Check

Returns `{"status": "ok"}` when the API is operational.

## Risk Rating Scale

| Score   | Rating (ID) | Meaning                                    |
| ------- | ----------- | ------------------------------------------ |
| 0       | Aman        | No breaches found                          |
| 1–25    | Rendah      | Minimal exposure, basic precautions enough |
| 26–50   | Sedang      | Moderate exposure, vigilance needed        |
| 51–75   | Tinggi      | Significant exposure, act now              |
| 76–100  | Kritis      | Critical exposure, immediate action needed |

## Security Policies

- No storage of email addresses or search history in any persistent database.
- Results cached in RAM only (max 10 minutes), then auto-deleted.
- Safe response headers enforced: CSP, HSTS, X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options.
- Input validation via Pydantic; internal stack traces hidden from API responses.
